# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending staged-rename remediation in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs`. `ralph pr open` now keeps rendered diff stats from cached numstat output for display, but derives `git commit` pathspecs through a separate mockable `staged_real_code_commit_paths` port backed by `git diff --cached --name-only -z --no-renames`, so rename display paths like `src/{old.rs => new.rs}` are no longer passed to `git commit`. Added NUL path parsing, updated the mock port and happy-path call assertions, kept review-scope filtering on the commit path list, and added a staged-rename regression asserting that the PR body still displays the rename while the commit receives pathspec-safe old/new paths.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the existing `pr_open` implementation and confirmed the failure came from reusing rendered diff-stat paths as commit pathspecs after the soft reset.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Added a dedicated
